svg.text: Tesseract vertex cycling through L1 tunnel between pump A and pump B
continuous cycle — posterior updates with each return
BINARY STAR ANALOG — PROBES AS PLANETS
The tesseract rotation ensures all 8 vertices are sampled per full
4D rotation. 12 probes on 3 shells cover all orientations simultaneously.
The probes do not leave the funded zone. They ride the corridor like planets ride a binary field.
Stephen Justin Burdick Sr. — Emerald Entities LLC — GIBUSH Systems — 2026
